name: narrative_momentum_score
description: Real-time trend velocity scoring. Submit any crypto topic, token, or narrative and receive a 0-100 momentum score based on social velocity, crypto-tuned sentiment analysis, and on-chain volume correlation. Identifies emerging trends before they peak and highlights early entry opportunities.

topic.description: Token ticker, narrative keyword, or crypto topic to score (e.g. 'AI Agents', 'SOL Meme Season', '$VIRTUAL').
